name: Effect
desc: Plays a sound effect or particle effect at a position (without a named sound).

fields.name: disableRelativeVolume
fields.desc: If true, plays at full volume regardless of position

notes: Effect IDs: 1000-1023 (sound events), 1500-2004 (particle events). Unlike S29 (named sound via resource location), S28 uses numeric IDs.

implementation.overview: S28 plays effect by numeric ID (sound or particle). Different from S29 which uses named sound keys. No module in the examined client sources directly targets S28.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S28PacketEffect)
modules.purpose: Server sends S28PacketEffect to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
